title: Weak Password Policy Bypass
description: Attackers could potentially bypass the standard password policy through brute-force attacks, dictionary attacks, or credential stuffing, especially if the password policy is overly permissive or lacks multi-factor authentication. This could lead to unauthorized access to user accounts.
attack_vector: Brute-force attacks, dictionary attacks, credential stuffing targeting the authentication service.
mitigations: Implement a strong password policy with complexity requirements (length, character types).
Enforce multi-factor authentication (MFA) for all user accounts.
Implement rate limiting and account lockout policies to mitigate brute-force attacks.
